title: Diamonds
quickAnswer: In modern overworld generation, diamonds are most common deep underground. Many players mine around Y -53 to -59 while avoiding too much lava exposure.
keyFacts: Diamond ore becomes more common the lower you go in the overworld.
Caving can outperform strip mining if you expose a lot of deepslate quickly.
Fortune increases your final yield after you find the ore.
commonMistakes: Mining too high and expecting older pre-1.18 ore patterns.
Standing directly on Y -59 in large lava pockets without planning a route.
